name: P 45 Knuckle Down Golf
about: P 45 Knuckle Down Golf is a professional golf training studio located in Warner Robins, GA, offering a data-driven approach to improvement. The facility is led by Ryan Carpenter, a golf professional with over 25 years of coaching experience, and utilizes cutting-edge 4D motion technology to analyze swings and provide personalized instruction. Sessions are hosted at a partner location, The Back Nine, which features a relaxed environment with virtual golf simulators for both practice and play on famous courses. The coaching style focuses on transforming raw data into actionable insights to help golfers of all levels break through plateaus and achieve measurable progress.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to advanced 4D motion technology for detailed swing analysis
Personalized, data-driven coaching from a seasoned golf professional
Focus on measurable progress and long-term skill development

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food services provided.
No information on alcohol services provided.

faq.answer: There is no information provided on a BYOB policy or on-site food and drink services.
